nasb.text: Then the watchman saw another man running; and the watchman called to the gatekeeper and said, “Behold, another man running by himself.” And the king said, “This one also is bringing good news.”

esv.text: The watchman saw another man running. And the watchman called to the gate and said, “See, another man running alone!” The king said, “He also brings news.”

cnv.text: 後來，守望的人又看見另一個人跑來，就對守城門的人喊叫，說：“看哪！又有一個人獨自跑來！”王說：“這也必是來報好消息的。”

ccb.text: 这时候，守卫又看见另一个人跑来，就大声对守城门的说：“又有一个人独自跑来了！”王说：“他也一定是传好消息的。”
